channel.title: AI on Marko
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Marko

item.title: Model context protocol
item.author: marko958m@gmail.com (Marko Peng)
item.description: Model Context Protocol I installed so many MCP servers on my AI agnets and they have magic. Just some short notes to help myself understand what MCP is. What it is MCP is something that helps the AI models nteract with external services, data sources in a structured, controlled way. Instead of letting the AI models to explore how to work with the external things itself, the MCP servers provide the safe and deterministic tools with descriptions so that AI models can easily understand and use them.
item.dc:creator: Marko Peng

item.title: Attention and Transformer
item.author: marko958m@gmail.com (Marko Peng)
item.description: Writting down some notes when tring to understand these 2 things. Some prerequisites Optional: Neural Networks Visualized Video A blog post about LSTM These 2 are the earlier version of AI. It describes what neural network is and how LSTM improves it. Not directly related to Attention and Transformer. Required: Word embedding. But no need to go deep. Just need to know that a matrix is used to represent a word’s meaning in a vector space.
item.dc:creator: Marko Peng
